title: Bombay High Court quashes ₹1,100 crore demand by MMRDA against Reliance Industries
description: The Bombay High Court on April 8 set aside demands of over ₹1,100 crore raised by the Mumbai Metropolitan Region Development Authority (MMRDA) against Reliance Industries Ltd for alleged delay in completing construction of its convention-cum-commercial complex in Mumbai suburbs [Reliance Industries Limited v. MMRDA & Ors.]A division bench of Chief Justice Shree Chandrashekhar and Justice Suman Shyam said that the additional premium claimed by MMRDA was illegal, arbitrary and hit by Article 1
